4.reason: [Error: This loop reads until EOF, but input ends with newline. Should stop after reading newline. Also, using ~ of scanf is non-standard and will cause indefinite wait for more input.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Reads until EOF including newline, causing length mismatch and potential hang; should read until newline.

6.reason: [Using ~scanf is undefined behavior; scanf returns EOF on failure, which is negative, but bitwise NOT (~) on negative values leads to large positive numbers causing infinite loop. Also, newline is not handled properly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using ~scanf is undefined behavior; scanf returns EOF on failure, which is negative, but bitwise NOT (~) on negative values leads to large positive numbers causing infinite loop. Also, newline is not handled properly.]
